TypeSignature.Value: .class public sequential ansi sealed beforefieldinit SKFourByteTag extends System.ValueType implements class System.IEquatable`1<valuetype SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag>

Docs.summary: Represents a four-character code (FourCC) identifier used to tag font features, variation axes, and other typed values.

Docs.param: The 32-bit unsigned integer representing the four-byte tag.

Docs.param: The string to parse. If the string is shorter than four characters, it is padded with spaces. If or empty, returns a zero-valued tag.
Docs.summary: Parses a string of up to four characters into an .
Docs.returns: An representing the first four characters of the string.

.method public hidebysig virtual instance string ToString() cil managed

Docs.summary: Returns the string representation of this four-byte tag.
Docs.returns: A four-character string where each character corresponds to one byte of the tag value.
